title: Cori's Improved OG Mobs
body:
_[​OPTIFINE OR EMF REQUIRED]_

Ever since Minecraft has added newer and newer mobs, I've noticed that the original mobs' models are incredibly bland in comparison. I started this project for the original mobs trying to keep what makes them iconic, but making their models better, closer to their original animal, have more variations, and have different baby models.

**Sheep:**
- Changed model 
- changed colorization to make more sense with IRL sheep

**Cow:**
- Changed model 
- Changed baby model _(removed horns)_
- Changed texture of original type _(more saturated, whiter spots) _
- Added more variations _(pure red, black and white, light brown, black, rare albino)_
  
**Mooshroom:** 
- Changed model
- Changed baby model _(removed horns)_
- Changed texture _(both red and brown)_

**Pig:**
- Changed model
- Added more variations _(yellower, brown, spotted versions of all of the above, black, white)_

**Chicken:**
- The MOST changed model 
- Changed model and texture for chicks
- Added more variations _(ivory, silver, scarlet, ciara, irona, rare albino)_

**Squid:**
- Changed model to actually look like a squid, 
- Added more variations _(speckled blue, purple, white, red, orange)_

**Glow Squid:**
- Changed model and texture

**Wolf:**
- Changed model slightly _(ears and tail)_

**Cat:**
- Changed model slightly _(ears)_
- Changed kitten model slightly _(tail)_
- Added more variations _(black spotted, dark gray, pale calico, tortoise shell, full red, foreign white, full tabby)_

**Ocelot:**
- Changed texture

**Fox:**
- Changed model
- Changed texture
- Changed texture for baby red foxes _(they're brown and scruffy)_
- Added rare black fox _(red fox varient)_

**Llama:**
- Changed model slightly

**Goat:**
- Changed model slightly
- Changed baby goat model _(removed horns)_
- Added more variations _(brown spots, dark brown spots, gray spots, black)_

**Ender Dragon:** 
- Gave my girl a glow up,
- Changed model
- Changed texture to fit new model



**Babies:** 
- Horse baby
- Donkey baby
- Camel baby 
models changed slightly.

**Variations**
**Armadillo:**_(lightest brown, brown, dark brown, rare albino)
**Camel:**(white, tan, brown)_
**Parrot:**_(Green Cheek Turquoise, Green Cheek Green, Galah, Eclectus, Dracula, Sun Conure, rare albino)_
**Turtle:**_(Lighter Green, Darker Green, Brown-Shelled Green, Hawksbill, Loggerhead, Kemp's Ridley, Olive Ridley, Leatherback, rare albino)_
**Frog**:
- **Cold Frog** _(Yellower Green, Browner Green, Spotted versions of above)_
- **Temperate Frog** _(Yellow-legged Orange, Yellower, Orange with Blue Legs, Spotted versions of above)_
- **Warm Frog** _(Green-hued, Orange-hued, Gray-colorization)_
